circuits.designation: Lighting GF — open office LED panels
Lighting GF — meeting rooms LED panels

selectivity_results.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 536 + BS EN 60947-2:2017 — Upstream 100A Type D MCCB at MSB-MAIN F01 selective against SDB-GF 100A switch-disconnector (non-OCPD pass-through device) at local 6.0 kA PFC; cascade is bounded by the downstream final-circuit MCBs.

BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 536 + BS EN 60898-1:2019 — 100A upstream MCCB (at MSB-MAIN F01) cascaded against final-circuit MCBs (≤32A); worst-case ratio 100:32 ≈ 3.1:1 sits comfortably above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold at the local 6.0 kA PFC; 10 kA Icn on the MCBs exceeds the local PFC.

assumptions: BS EN 61439-3 Distribution Board (DBO) used for the sub-DB.
BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 411.3.3: 30mA Type A RCD applied to all socket-bearing circuits (C04-C08, C10-C12).
Emergency lighting C03 supplied on dedicated circuit per BS 7671 §560 — no RCD upstream to preserve life-safety availability.
HVAC FCU C09 is a fixed motor circuit (no socket): Type C curve handles inrush; no RCD required (Reg 411.3.3 socket exemption).
Estimated PFC at SDB-GF ≈ 6.0 kA after 15m 35mm² SWA feeder impedance from 9.8kA at MSB-MAIN.

drawing_notes: SDB-GF located in ground-floor electrical cupboard.
Fed from MSB-MAIN F01 via 15m 35mm² 5-core SWA XLPE Cu feeder.

rationale.chat_summary: SDB-GF: 100A TPN+E ground-floor sub-DB for a UK 3-storey office, 12 final circuits (lighting + emergency + socket RFCs + HVAC FCU + IT/AV), fed from MSB-MAIN F01 via 15m 35mm² SWA. BS EN 61439-3 DBO IP4X enclosure. 30mA Type A RCD on all socket circuits per BS 7671 § 411.3.3; emergency lighting and HVAC FCU intentionally excluded. Cascade selectivity to F01 verified at 3.1:1 worst-case at the local 6.0 kA PFC.

sections.title: Board Identification
sections.summary: SDB-GF is the ground-floor sub-DB for the UK 3-storey office, located in the ground-floor electrical cupboard. Built as a BS EN 61439-3 Distribution Board (DBO) — the UK default for sub-DB construction — with IP4X rating for the indoor cupboard environment. Role flagged as `floor_distribution` so downstream consumers (riser, cable-containment, earthing) recognise the per-floor cascade topology and small-power+lighting+HVAC mix.

decisions.label: Board role flagged as floor_distribution
decisions.summary: Signals per-floor distribution function to downstream skills (riser, cable-containment, earthing); part of the MSB-MAIN → SDB-GF/L1/L2 cascade.

decisions.label: BS EN 61439-3 DBO enclosure, IP4X
decisions.summary: DBO-class assembly per BS EN 61439-3 is the UK sub-DB default; IP4X protects against solid objects ≥1 mm in the indoor cupboard environment.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 100A TPN+E intake at 400V fed from MSB-MAIN F01 via a 15m 35mm² 5-core SWA XLPE Cu feeder. Declared PFC at SDB-GF is 6.0 kA — attenuated from the 9.8 kA at MSB-MAIN by the feeder impedance; covered comfortably by the 10 kA Icn on all final-circuit MCBs. Main switch is a 100A switch-disconnector (non-OCPD isolation device) at 10 kA Icw, sized to match the feeder rating; overcurrent protection for the feeder + sub-DB busbar sits on the upstream F01 MCCB at MSB-MAIN.

decisions.label: 100A TPN+E intake from MSB-MAIN F01 (15m feeder)
decisions.summary: Floor maximum demand ~28 kVA after BS 7671 § 311 + IET OSG Appendix A diversity sits within the 100A intake; matches the F01 feeder rating.
decisions.rule: Sub-DB sizing from floor maximum demand + diversity
decisions.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 311 + IET On-Site Guide Appendix A

decisions.label: Declared PFC 6.0 kA at SDB-GF after feeder impedance
decisions.summary: Attenuation from 9.8 kA at MSB-MAIN via 15m 35mm² Cu SWA impedance; covered by 10 kA Icn final-circuit MCBs with ~67% headroom.

decisions.label: 100A switch-disconnector as main switch
decisions.summary: Sub-DB main switch is a non-OCPD switch-disconnector — overcurrent protection lives upstream on the MSB-MAIN F01 MCCB; switch-disconnector provides on-load isolation only per UK sub-DB convention.

sections.title: Circuit Breakdown
sections.summary: 12 final circuits: C01/C02 lighting (Type B MCBs, no RCD), C03 emergency lighting (Type B, no RCD, dedicated circuit per BS 7671 § 560), C04-C06 socket RFCs at 32A (Type B + 30mA Type A RCD), C07 kitchen radial 20A (Type B + 30mA), C08 dedicated printer/copier socket 16A (Type B + 30mA), C09 HVAC FCU 32A (Type C, no RCD — fixed-motor circuit exempt from § 411.3.3 socket-RCD), C10 cleaner sockets 20A (Type B + 30mA), C11 IT/data ring 32A (Type B + 30mA), C12 AV radial 20A (Type B + 30mA). Diversity not applied at sub-DB level — applied upstream at MSB-MAIN per BS 7671 § 311.

decisions.label: 30mA Type A RCD on all socket-bearing circuits
decisions.summary: BS 7671 § 411.3.3 + § 415.1 universal socket-RCD policy on C04-C08, C10-C12; Type A handles pulsating-DC residual from modern switching supplies (IT equipment, LED drivers, A/V).

decisions.label: Emergency lighting C03 — no upstream RCD
decisions.summary: BS 7671 § 560 + BS 5266-1 require life-safety circuit availability — RCD upstream would create a single point of failure for the emergency-lighting circuit; dedicated MCB-only protection retained.

decisions.label: HVAC FCU C09 — Type C, no RCD
decisions.summary: Fixed motor circuit (no socket) — outside the § 411.3.3 socket-RCD scope; Type C curve handles motor inrush without nuisance trip on the 32A MCB.
decisions.rule: Fixed-motor circuit MCB curve + RCD exemption

sections.title: Selectivity Analysis
sections.summary: Two-stage cascade: 100A Type D MCCB at MSB-MAIN F01, then non-OCPD 100A switch-disconnector at SDB-GF, then final MCBs (6-32A Type B/C). Worst-case feeder-MCCB-to-final-MCB ratio is 100:32 ≈ 3.1:1, above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold. The Type D upstream curve trips slower than Type B/C final MCBs at every fault magnitude up to the 6.0 kA local PFC, so the downstream MCB clears before the MCCB operates. 10 kA Icn on all final MCBs exceeds 6.0 kA local PFC. Engineer-declared verdict is firm; a downstream tool-call against a manufacturer cascade table is desirable for RCBO-coordination on socket circuits but not strictly required at this PFC.

decisions.label: Cascade ratio 3.1:1 worst-case at C09 (32A)
decisions.summary: 100A:32A feeder-MCCB-to-final-MCB ratio sits above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold; ratio is more comfortable for lighting circuits (100:6 ≈ 16:1) and equals the SDB-L1/L2 cascade analysis.

decisions.label: Type D upstream + Type B/C downstream — curve separation aids selectivity
decisions.summary: Type D MCCB at F01 has a 10-20× In magnetic trip threshold; Type B downstream MCBs trip at 3-5× In — curve separation ensures downstream MCB always operates first for faults below the upstream magnetic threshold.

sections.title: Compliance Assessment
sections.summary: SDB-GF compliant against BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 (protection § 411 / § 415 / § 434 / § 536, emergency-lighting § 560, cable-sizing Appendix 4, voltage-drop Appendix 12), BS EN 61439-3:2012 (DBO assembly construction), BS EN 60898-1:2019 (final-circuit MCBs), and BS EN 61009-1:2012 where socket-circuit RCBOs are used. No CRITICAL or HIGH flags raised. The 15m feeder is the shortest of the three SDB cascades — voltage-drop margin is generous.

decisions.label: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 + BS EN 61439-3 citation discipline
decisions.summary: Protection clauses cite BS 7671 directly (UK source jurisdiction for the IET Wiring Regulations); enclosure construction cites BS EN 61439-3 as the DBO assembly standard.

decisions.label: DBO enclosure construction
decisions.summary: Distribution Board built and verified per BS EN 61439-3:2012 — UK sub-DB default for the DBO class.

sections.title: Schedule Notes
sections.summary: Schedule emitted as 12-row table with 4 spare ways (W13-W16) reserved for floor expansion (additional desk-banks, future-fit small-power, occupancy-driven AV upgrade). Voltage-drop on the 15m feeder is comfortably within BS 7671 Appendix 12 limits at the rated 100A; final-circuit voltage drops on the longer 30-35m radial/RFC runs (C04, C10, C11) are within the BS 7671 § 525.1 3% lighting / 5% other limits at 32A 2.5mm² Cu. No per-circuit ambient derating applied because the cupboard interior temperature is moderated by adjacent corridor airflow.

decisions.label: 4 spare ways reserved (W13-W16)
decisions.summary: Floor-expansion provision: additional desk-bank socket RFC, future-fit small-power for re-fit, occupancy-driven AV upgrade, or HVAC re-zoning.

decisions.label: Voltage drop within BS 7671 § 525 limits
decisions.summary: Final-circuit voltage drops at 32A 2.5mm² Cu on RFC runs ≤35m sit within the 3% lighting / 5% other limits per BS 7671 § 525.1; downstream cable-sizing skill should confirm with actual load currents.
